result.stdout:
Description:
  AzureDiagrams

Usage:
  AzureDiagramGenerator [options]

Options:
  --subscription-id <subscription-id> (REQUIRED)
  --tenant-id <tenant-id>
  --resource-group <resource-group> (REQUIRED)    Resource group(s) containing resources. You can pass multiple, and used the wildcard * character.
  --output <output>                               Output folder for generated diagram
  --condensed                                     Condenses Private Endpoints / VNet Integration. For large deployments this can greatly simplify the diagram.
  --show-diagnostics                              Show diagnostics flows
  --show-inferred                                 Show runtime flows inferred from app-settings
  --show-runtime                                  Show runtime flows defined on the management plane
  --show-identity                                 Show runtime flows to managed identities
  --token <token>                                 Access token that can read the resources
  --output-file-name <output-file-name>           File name to write to (will use convention to determine based on a resource-group name if not provided)
  --output-png                                    Output png file with draw.io diagram embedded
  --version                                       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                  Show help and usage information
